zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Throckmorton於1451年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，他的父親Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton39歲，母親Margaret Olney25歲。他於1475年與Katherine Marrow在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1518年8月12日在亞特 澤亞享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾庫頓。

nameMeanings.name: Throckmorton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Throckmorton in Worcestershire, which is named with Old English throc ‘beam bridge’ + mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

History: The Throckmorton family was powerful and influential in England in Tudor times, but has since almost died out there. American bearers of the name trace their descent from either John Throckmorton (1601–1684) of New England or Robert Throckmorton (1609–1663) of VA.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Throckmorton was born in 1451, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, his father, Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton, was 39 and his mother, Margaret Olney, was 25. He married Katherine Marrow in 1475, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 12 August 1518, in At Sea, at the age of 67, and was buried in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Throckmorton est né en 1451, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margaret Olney, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Marrow en 1475, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 12 août 1518, à En mer, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Throckmorton(이)가 1451년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Olney(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1475년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 Katherine Marrow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1518년 8월 12일 앳 시에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 코우그h턴에 묻혔다.

ru.South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, England: соут элмхам ст питир, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Throckmorton родился в 1451 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Olney, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Marrow в 1475 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 12 августа 1518 г. в местности ат сеа в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.
